question:
There are two hospitals in a town. On average 45 babies are born each day in the larger hospital, and 15 in the smaller. The probability of a baby being a boy is about 0.52 , and the probability of twins is about 0.012 . On any day which hospital is more likely
(a) to have a set of twins delivered,
(b) to have more than $60 \%$ of babies being boys?
answer:
(a) The larger hospital, simply because there are more births.
(b) The day to day variation in the proportion of boys will be greater in the smaller hospital, so it is more likely to have more than $60 \%$ of babies being boys on any day.
